reasoning: The unsafe findings are false positives: 1) The unresolved template in setup.sh isn't executed during AUR build/install. 2) The RPM build script isn't used in Arch packaging. PKGBUILD uses pinned sources and safe build commands.
disagreement_analysis: qwen overreacted to non-executed scripts (setup.sh and RPM build script) without considering AUR build context
false_positives: setup.sh: Unresolved template poses no risk as script isn't executed in AUR context
build-jitsi-rpm.sh: Not used in PKGBUILD; git pull/secrets irrelevant to Arch build
learnings: Improve context-awareness: Models must verify if scripts are actually executed during makepkg (via PKGBUILD/.install hooks)
Prioritize files referenced in PKGBUILD functions (build/package) over generic source scripts
Add validation for placeholder substitution in build scripts
